phase: lowvol60 Validity Audit -- Stage 0 pre-registration (CB-017, 4-test diagnostics)
discipline: All test definitions, thresholds, and the decision rule are frozen BEFORE any test is run. No post-hoc adjustment allowed. This is a diagnostic (BÜTÇE-DIŞI), not a new Faz 0 IC measurement.

context.motivation: lowvol60 is the sole marginal Faz-0 survivor (D-178: honest_t=2.59, ICIRno=0.51, h21). CB-017 hypothesis: lowvol60 ~= D-layer regime shadow + multiple-testing artifact. Faz 1 BLOCKED until this audit.
context.budget_note: N<=3 Faz 0 budget is CLOSED (D-177/D-178/D-183). This audit is diagnostic (CB-017 CRITIC_BACKLOG.md, 30 May 2026) -- NOT a new factor IC measurement.

frozen_decision_rule.2_tests_fail: Faz 1 with lowvol60 as primary factor is not rational
frozen_decision_rule.3_tests_fail: Architectural premise re-think: regime-conditional MV-BIST + liquidity gates is more parsimonious than quantamental ranking
frozen_decision_rule.rule_source: CB-017 CRITIC_BACKLOG.md (pre-registered BEFORE running tests; no post-hoc adjustment)

T1_regime_conditional_ic.description: Split lowvol60 IC (h=21) into D=ON vs D=OFF dates using XU100 200-MA proxy.
T1_regime_conditional_ic.regime_proxy: XU100 price > 200-day MA (ARCHITECTURE sec.3.1 primary switch: 'primary rejim switch: XU100>200-MA + breadth'). L2 macro score (classify_regime) requires live TCMB/CDS not frozen in snapshot -> deterministic price-based proxy used instead.
T1_regime_conditional_ic.warmup_caveat: 200-day MA warm-up: first ~200 trading days from 2024-01-01 (~2024-10) are excluded. ~380/588 dates used. Documented in result.
T1_regime_conditional_ic.threshold_fail: >=80% of total IC sum from D=ON dates => FAIL (same-bet hypothesis confirmed)

T2_macro_residual_ic.description: OLS: IC_t ~ const + b1*BIST_RV30_t [+ b2*USDTRY_vol30_t]. Test significance of intercept via NW-HAC.
T2_macro_residual_ic.method: TIME-SERIES OLS (macro vars are market-wide scalars; cross-sectional regression meaningless for market-level variables). Intercept captures IC mean independent of macro level.
T2_macro_residual_ic.test_statistic: |t_HAC(intercept)| >= D184_RESIDUAL_T_MIN (2.0); NW-HAC SE with Bartlett kernel lag=21
T2_macro_residual_ic.verdict_pass: |t_HAC(intercept)| >= 2.0 => IC has positive mean independent of macro (PASS)
T2_macro_residual_ic.verdict_fail: |t_HAC(intercept)| < 2.0 => IC mean fully attributable to macro (FAIL)
T2_macro_residual_ic.primary_model: 2-variable: const + BIST_RV30 (always available from frozen XU100 prices)
T2_macro_residual_ic.optional_extension: 3-variable: + USDTRY_vol30 (yfinance USDTRY=X; optional; if API unavailable, 2-var is primary)

data_sources.bist_rv: Rolling 30-day realized vol of XU100 returns (frozen faz0_v2 snapshot)
data_sources.usdtry_vol: Rolling 30-day USDTRY log-return vol from yfinance USDTRY=X (frozen as faz0_macro_aux.parquet)

T3_multiple_testing.description: Holm-Bonferroni + BH-FDR correction over all Faz-0 (factor x horizon) p-values.
T3_multiple_testing.counting_conservative: ALL attempted tests from D-177 v1 + D-178 v2 (including D-177 v1 methodological flaws -- documented)
T3_multiple_testing.counting_principled: ELIGIBLE only: non-overlap n >= 12 (from D-178 v2)
T3_multiple_testing.verdict_fail: lowvol60 h21 does NOT survive Holm correction (statistical artifact)

T4_oos_regime_stability.description: Apply lowvol60 rank-IC to 2019-01-01 to 2023-08-31 (OOS, different regime).
T4_oos_regime_stability.verdict_pass: sign-stable (same direction as D-178) + honest_t positive => OOS-robust (PASS)
T4_oos_regime_stability.adv_floor: NOT applied (2019 TL volumes incomparable to 2024 scale; documented caveat)

survivorship_bias.caveat: 2025-2026 BIST100 constituent list applied retroactively to 2019-2023. Some current tickers not listed in 2019 -> silently dropped by yfinance (<20 rows). Bias direction: survivors-only inflates performance -> fail finding is CONSERVATIVE (real IC likely weaker), pass finding is OVERSTATED.

T4_oos_regime_stability.data_source: New yfinance fetch; frozen as data/snapshots/faz0_oos_2019_2023.parquet

dokunulmaz: engine/composite/conviction, thresholds.py, D-177/178/183 sonuc+snapshot dosyalari, ic_calculator.py
